description: Use this API to merge a number of AC contingency solution files (acc files) into one acc file. The acc files must be based on the same base case and MON file. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = accc_multiple_merge(option, nfiles, acfiles, accfile)

parameters.name: nfiles
parameters.description: The number of contingency acc files to be merged. . (input).

parameters.name: acfiles
parameters.description: An array of nfiles elements specifying An array of names of acc files. . (input).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: The name of the merged contingency acc file. . (input).

option.description: Do not merge .acc files if some .acc files have different solving options, sub files or .mon files.
Merge the.acc files even if some .acc files have different solving options, sub files or .mon files.

error_codes.description: error opening a Contingency Solution Output File.
file is not in the form of a current Contingency Solution Output File.
some input .acc files have different information (.sav, .sub, .mon, PSSE version, solution options).
error reading or writing Contingency Solution Output file.
error reading a Contingency Solution Output File.
error closing a Contingency Solution Output file.
Prerequisite requirements for function not met.
